documentation_accuracy_summary: docs/README.md was updated in the intended direction and now describes the web app as a Milestone 2 public/auth shell, but that documentation is slightly ahead of the current UI because the shared homepage layout still renders Milestone 1 copy.
test_sufficiency_summary: Insufficient for the acceptance criteria as written: the targeted Vitest file passes, but it only guards app/page.tsx and misses the shared layout text that is also visible on the homepage.
A follow-up test should cover the rendered homepage shell (or at minimum assert the layout branding strings) so Milestone 1 regressions in layout.tsx are caught.
